patch_title: Patch 7.11 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

changes: Cast time of applicable actions reduced from 1.44 to 1.32 seconds
Spell recast time reduced from 2.4 to 2.2 seconds
Shield Smite recast time increased from 20 to 24 seconds
Imperator: HP restored by Sacred Claim reduced from 4,000 to 3,000
Holy Sheltron: Barrier strength reduced from 10,000 to 8,000 potency

Onslaught potency increased from 400-4,000 to 500-5,000

Orogeny: Potency increased from 800-8,000 to 1,000-10,000

Tendo Setsugekka range increased from 5 to 8 yalms
Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka range increased from 5 to 8 yalms

Uncoiled Twinblood potency increased from 3,000 to 4,000
Wildfire: Attacks needed to detonate reduced from 5 to 4
Wildfire: Potency per attack increased from 3,000 to 4,000
Full Metal Field recast time reduced from 40 to 32 seconds

Flare Star damage over time duration increased from 6 to 9 seconds
Crimson Cyclone potency increased from 4,000 to 6,000
